description: May and Andrew Garner talk over coffee in the Playground's kitchen after Skye's initial session. Their conversation is laced with personal subtext, both reminiscing and probing into each other’s present lives, revealing warmth beneath the professional surface.

transcript.line: If I were to ask you what's going on, you wouldn't tell me, right?
Ah. A little gossip won you some points.
I appreciate you giving me permission to disclose details when necessary.
She thinks the world of you.
I taught her how to fire an automatic. Of course she likes me.
Seeing anyone? Mm. All work and no play.
When I multitask, I make mistakes.
Hmm. Sounds like there's a story there.
I saw a frame on your desk. Girlfriend pics? Aren't you a little too old for that?
Well... You tell me about your mistake, and I'll tell you about it.
You hungry? I can fix you something.
